---
title: "Generating Simulated Data"
author: "Lisa DeBruine"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
editor: visual
bibliography: references.bib
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(faux)
```

# Load and Process Test Data

```{r}
source("read_qualtrics_data.R")
d <- load_data("data/pilot/TPSai_19+March+2026_16.20.csv")
factors_data <- d$items_data %>% 
  select(d$cols_tpsai) %>% 
  mutate(across(everything(), ~replace_na(.x, 3)))

# fix for new item name
factors_data$DT_14[1:3] <- c(4,4,3)

# fix uniform values
factors_data$TR_19[[1]] <- 2
factors_data$CD_01[[1]] <- 4

# xx <- factors_data |>
#   add_between(gender = c("M", "F", "NB"), 
#               .prob = c(.45, .45, .1), 
#               .shuffle = TRUE)
```

# Compute and Shrink Correlations

```{r}
raw_cor <- cor(factors_data, method = 'spearman', use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

shrinkage <- 0.85
xcors <- raw_cor |> 
  as_tibble(rownames = "item") |>
  pivot_longer(-item, names_to = "item2", values_to = "r") |>
  mutate(item = gsub("_(\\d)$", "_0\\1", item),
         item2 = gsub("_(\\d)$", "_0\\1", item2)) |>
  filter(item < item2) |>
  mutate(shrink = ifelse(r < 0, -1, 1) * abs(r) * shrinkage)|>
  arrange(item, item2)
```

```{r}
ggplot(xcors, aes(x = shrink)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.05) +
  xlim(-1.1, 1.1)
```

# Generate Simulated Data from Correlation Matrix

```{r}
item_names <- unique(c(xcors$item, xcors$item2))

set.seed(8675309)
simdat_efa <- sim_design(
  n = 200, 
  within = list(item = item_names),
  r = xcors$shrink,
  sep = "~",
  plot = FALSE,
  long = TRUE
) |>
  mutate(likert = norm2likert(y, c(1, 2, 3, 2, 1), labels = 1:5)) |>
  separate(item, c("scale", "scale_n"), remove = FALSE)

set.seed(23516847)
simdat_cfa <- sim_design(
  n = 300, 
  within = list(item = item_names),
  r = xcors$shrink,
  sep = "~",
  plot = FALSE,
  long = TRUE
) |>
  mutate(likert = norm2likert(y, c(1, 2, 3, 2, 1), labels = 1:5)) |>
  separate(item, c("scale", "scale_n"), remove = FALSE)
```

```{r}
ggplot(simdat_efa, aes(x = likert, fill = scale)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~scale)
```

# Write Simulated Data to CSV

```{r}
simdat_efa |>
  select(id, item, likert) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = item, values_from = likert) |>
  write_csv("data/pilot/simulated_efa_data.csv")

simdat_cfa |>
  select(id, item, likert) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = item, values_from = likert) |>
  write_csv("data/pilot/simulated_cfa_data.csv")
```

\
